pr_title: SDLC-30: Fix baggage pricing haul threshold in booking service
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the booking service haul classification so checked-baggage defaults are applied correctly:
- flights shorter than 6 hours use the short-haul fee (€35)
- flights 6 hours or longer use the long-haul fee (€70)

## What changed
- Corrected the haul threshold logic in `booking_service.py`
- Updated booking service tests to cover both sides of the 6-hour boundary
- Preserved explicit baggage pricing behavior

## Validation
- Targeted booking service tests pass
- Boundary behavior verified at < 6 hours and >= 6 hours

## Notes
This is a localized fix in the booking service only; no broader pricing changes were introduced.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
